name: Δ Hidden Forbidden Dead Wood
author: ᵂᶤʳᵉᵈ
description: The entrance to the Land of the Dead‚ the Dead World of Indieglut Lugh․ Its giant‚ pure-white tree‚ ＂Fladdogd＂‚ acts as a seal to keep Cernunnos‚ the Lord of the Dead‚ from rising up and attacking the living world․ Rumors claim that if you look at your reflection in the underground lake during a real full moon‚ you'll see your real face instead of your avatar's․ Faithfully recreated from the game ․hack⁄⁄GU Last Recode
